final:
module lfsr (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            lfsr_out <= 5'b00000;
        end else begin
            lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[2]};
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      lfsr_out <= ~lfsr_out;
    end
  end

endmodule
